title: Guided Author Workspace
concept: A checklist-led, tabbed Playground workspace for Blueprint authors that teaches the existing capabilities in sequence while keeping the active WordPress browser, save state, authoring tools, Site Manager, library, and gallery reachable from one dark diagnostics surface.
focus: dark diagnostics surface with light work cards
progressive discovery without new product features
flows: Use the default checklist to move through start source selection, saving, blueprint authoring, file inspection, database checks, and export actions.
Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, import zip, featured Blueprint shortcuts, or the full gallery.
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with file-copy progress, then manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions.
Use Site Manager tabs for runtime settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, export to GitHub, and zip download.
Browse and filter the Blueprint gallery by category and run selected gallery entries.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
